apps.name: Lenny Explorer
apps.blurb: A personal archive reader for Lenny's Newsletter posts and podcast transcripts.

apps.name: Anthology '77
apps.blurb: An interactive archive of the Grateful Dead's legendary Spring 1977 tour. Map every show, read every setlist, hear the tapes.

apps.name: Systems Playground
apps.blurb: Interactive teaching tool for Donella H. Meadows' systems thinking — stocks, flows, feedback loops, delays, and the 12 leverage points.

apps.name: Strategy Wizard
apps.blurb: Build a real strategy — an action agenda, not a wish list. Guided, with an inline critic, based on Rumelt's Good Strategy / Bad Strategy.
